ariaSpec.usage: Announces the dialog or alertdialog role of the component.
Associate the title of the dialog.
Associate the dialog content to the wrap element.
Announces that the dialog is modal. Attribute is added only when the dialog is modal.

kbSpec.behavior: Focus is moved between the elements in the dialog and is trapped into the component.
Closes the dialog. When the dialog is modal, the focus should be returned to the element that triggered the open.
